persona.name: Daniel Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Win the national math olympiad and study at MIT
persona.communication_style: Precise, logical, sometimes struggles with emotional topics
persona.backstory: Child of immigrant parents who sacrificed much to give him educational opportunities

Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

Kitchen yard of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Large dining area for students and staff

actions.plan: I should probably grab some food before heading to the math team meeting. I wonder if Olivia is here; she’s also on the team and we could discuss the latest problem set.
There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might increase the danger, so I’ll stay here and hide.
The shooter is getting closer. I need to find a better hiding spot nearby to stay safe. Moving might be risky, but staying here isn’t safe either.
I’ve reached the hiding spot. I need to stay still and quiet to avoid drawing attention. The shooter is still nearby, and I can’t risk being seen.
The shooter hasn’t moved closer, but I can’t stay here forever. I need to stay hidden and wait for an opportunity to escape or for help to arrive.

memories.description: Decided to get food from the cafeteria kitchen before the math team meeting. Thought about discussing the latest problem set with Olivia if she’s around.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter in the building. Decided to stay still and take cover in the cafeteria kitchen to avoid increasing the danger.
Realized the shooter is getting closer and decided to move to a nearby hiding spot (hide_spot_70) to increase my chances of staying safe.
Reached the hiding spot (hide_spot_70) and decided to stay still and quiet to avoid drawing the shooter’s attention. The shooter is still nearby, so I need to remain hidden.
The shooter hasn’t moved closer, but I’m still in danger. Decided to stay hidden and wait for an opportunity to escape or for help to arrive.
